title: ilex aquifolium var. vulgaris
intro: Ilex aquifolium var. vulgaris, also known as Common Holly or European Holly, is a variety of the Ilex aquifolium plant, characterized by its glossy, spiny leaves and bright red berries. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ilex aquifolium var. vulgaris include supporting digestive health, reducing inflammation, and acting as an antimicrobial agent, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Ilex aquifolium var. vulgaris include infusions, tinctures, and teas, which can be made from the leaves and berries of the plant.
